slash.description: Run the Slash compression tool commands (stats, bench, audit, daemon, cache, purge, etc.)
slash.template: Run `./slash $ARGUMENTS` from the project root at /Users/yoosuf/Desktop/slash/slash and return the output to the user.

slash-retrieve.description: Retrieve decompressed content by handle from the Slash cache
slash-retrieve.template: Run `./slash cache check $ARGUMENTS` from the project root at /Users/yoosuf/Desktop/slash/slash and return the result.

slash-purge.template: Run `./slash purge` from the project root at /Users/yoosuf/Desktop/slash/slash and return the output.

slash-plugins.description: List installed Slash plugins for all supported editors/tools
slash-plugins.template: Run `./slash plugin ls` from the project root at /Users/yoosuf/Desktop/slash/slash and return the output to the user.
